programme.title: Ocean's Twelve
programme.desc: The crooks reunite when an old enemy catches up with them and demands they repay the money they stole from him three years previously. In response, the gang comes up with another larcenous plan - but reckons without the interventions of a fellow thief and a sultry Interpol agent. Crime caper sequel, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia an

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A man who has been trapped inside a mysterious jungle board game for 26 years is eventually freed when two children start to play it. Unfortunately, he arrives with a rampaging horde of animals on his heels, leaving only one solution - to finish the game he started all those years ago. Fantasy adventure, starring Robin Williams, Kirsten Dunst and Bonnie Hunt.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the game's wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack B

programme.desc: Players of Jumanji return, but as they attempt to rescue one of their own, they will have to brave parts unknown from arid deserts to snowy mountains, to escape the world's most dangerous game. programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: Players of Jumanji return, but as they attempt to rescue one of their own, they will have to brave parts unknown from arid deserts to snowy mountains, to escape the world's most dangerous game. Director Jake Kasdan's fantasy adventure sequel to his 2017 rebooted hit Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A man who has been trapped inside a mysterious jungle board game for 26 years is eventually freed when two children start to play it. Unfortunately, he arrives with a rampaging horde of animals on his heels, leaving only one solution - to finish the game he started all those years ago. Fantasy adventure, starring Robin Williams, Kirsten Dunst and Bonnie Hunt.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the game's wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack B

programme.title: Blade II
programme.desc: Wesley Snipes returns as the human-vampire hybrid, forced to work with unexpected allies to battle a genocidal group of mutants.

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: In a town troubled by bloodsuckers, Corey Haim's brother starts behaving like a vamp, so he sets out to take down Kiefer Sutherland. Flashing images.

programme.title: Afraid
programme.desc: A family are selected to test a new AI home assistant, which quickly takes on terrifying methods to keep them safe. Sci-fi horror with John Cho.

programme.title: The Damned
programme.desc: A 19th-century widow must make an impossible choice when, during a cruel winter, a foreign ship sinks off the coast of her fishing village. Horror.

programme.title: Beast Of War
programme.desc: A group of young soldiers find themselves stranded on a raft in the middle of the ocean and must battle for their lives against a giant, hungry great white shark.

programme.title: Opus
programme.desc: A writer travels to the remote compound of outcasted legendary pop star John Malkovich, where she discovers the twisted plans of his cult.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: A troubled priest and a novice nun battle a malevolent force when they're sent to investigate the apparent suicide of a Romanian nun.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Epic action as Navy scrappers Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Alexander Skarsgard face an alien armada. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Craft
programme.desc: Hip horror movie about four female students who band together and become witches. Starring Fairuza Balk, Robin Tunney and Neve Campbell.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last...
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about their gruesome secret from their past. With Madelyn Cline. Language/violence/sex.

programme.title: IT
programme.desc: Hit adaptation of the Stephen King novel about a ragtag bunch of bullied outsiders battling evil, sewer-dwelling clown Pennywise. Jaeden Lieberher stars.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Would it kill you to smile? Pop star Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Horror sequel.

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: In a town troubled by bloodsuckers, Corey Haim's brother starts behaving like a vamp, so he sets out to take down Kiefer Sutherland. Flashing images.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: In an oppressive future society, a wrongly convicted prisoner is forced to participate in a deadly gameshow. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: A woman involved in a car accident wakes up in a cramped underground bunker with two men she's never met. Tense thriller.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: In the distant future, father and son Will and Jaden Smith crash land on an abandoned Earth, which has evolved to destroy human life. Sci-fi epic. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Gator Creek
programme.desc: Vacation turns to disaster when Kyle and her friends survive a plane crash in the Louisiana Bayou, only to discover something infinitely worse lurking in the shallows.

programme.title: Lovely, Dark, And Deep
programme.desc: A new back-country ranger travels alone through the dangerous wilderness, hoping to uncover the origins of a tragedy that has haunted her since childhood.

programme.title: Men In Black II
programme.desc: With the scum of the universe menacing Earth, agent Will Smith brings back Tommy Lee Jones to kick alien backside. Out-of-this-world comic sequel.

programme.title: Interview With The Vampire
programme.desc: Tom Cruise is vengeful vamp Lestat and Brad Pitt his unwilling companion in this epic adaptation of Anne Rice's blood-sucking chronicles. Sex/strong language.

programme.title: True Romance
programme.desc: Christian Slater goes on the run with hooker Patricia Arquette and $5m in cocaine stolen from mobster Christopher Walken. Strong language/violence/stereo sound only.

programme.title: Speak Like A Child
programme.desc: Moving drama about three close friends forever tied to a dark secret from their teenage past. Drama.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: With cultural traditions driving a wedge between them, newly weds Alex and Isabel must find compromise to make the marriage last. Starring the late Matthew Perry.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Goldie Hawn, Diane Keaton and Bette Midler take revenge on the husbands who dumped them for trophy wives. Girl power comedy with Maggie Smith and Sarah Jessica Parker.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: Sunny waitress Drew Barrymore helps dumped and depressed wedding singer Adam Sandler get his groove back in this loveable 80s-set comedy. Strong language.

programme.title: Sleepless In Seattle
programme.desc: Lonely widower Tom Hanks becomes a reluctant radio star when his young son calls in to a talk show requesting him a new wife. Classic Nora Ephron romcom with Meg Ryan.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as a struggling sports agent who falls for single mum Renee Zellweger. Top romantic comedy with Cuba Gooding Jr. Language.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: Young lawyer Tom Cruise becomes embroiled in his new firm's shady dealings. Sydney Pollack directs this gripping drama. Contains strong language and violence.

programme.title: Interview With The Vampire
programme.desc: Tom Cruise is vengeful vamp Lestat and Brad Pitt his unwilling companion in this epic adaptation of Anne Rice's blood-sucking chronicles. Sex/strong language.

programme.title: Seven
programme.desc: Veteran detective Morgan Freeman and rookie Brad Pitt hunt serial killer Kevin Spacey as he embarks on a seven deadly sins-centric murder spree. Classic crime thriller.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Action man Brendan Fraser goes head-to-head with the undead remains of High Priest Imhotep. All-out action with Rachel Weisz. Contains violence and flashing images.

programme.title: Goodfellas
programme.desc: The late Ray Liotta stars in Martin Scorsese's epic Mob drama, charting the rise of real-life gangster Henry Hill. Robert De Niro and Joe Pesci also star.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Thief George Clooney finds himself besieged by vampires in a desert saloon. Contains strong language, violence, sex, mature scenes and flashing images.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Fred Ward play handymen working in a desolate desert town which is invaded by giant, underground worms. Cult classic spoof of 1950s monster movies.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A wayward orphan befriends a captive killer whale, but when danger comes calling he vows to release his new pal safely into the wild. Family drama with Michael Madsen.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain Hook kidnaps his kids, an adult Peter Pan returns to Neverland to save them. Adventure starring Robin Williams. Flashing images.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: When genetically-engineered dinosaurs break loose on a remote island, a group of experts are on the menu. Classic from Steven Spielberg. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: In this hit sequel to Jurassic Park, scientists discover a second dinosaur island which has been untouched - until now... Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Falling Down
programme.desc: Joel Schumacher's darkly comic thriller stars Michael Douglas as a laid-off worker who finally gets pushed too far. Strong language/violence/stereo sound only.

programme.title: Extremely Wicked, Shockingly...
programme.desc: Sky Cinema original exploring the crimes of Ted Bundy (Zac Efron) from the perspective of his girlfriend Elizabeth Kloepfer. Language/violence/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When a young girl disappears, a series of past disappearances begin to link together, altering a broken family's history. Thriller.

programme.title: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: Paul Newman and Steve McQueen are the heroes fighting to save lives when fire engulfs a tower block. Oscar-winning disaster epic.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: Vince Vaughn is the motel keeper with a shocking secret in Gus Van Sant's remake of the terrifying Hitchcock classic. With Anne Heche and Julianne Moore. Violent scenes.

programme.title: The Girl On The Train
programme.desc: Adaptation of the hit book starring Emily Blunt as an alcoholic divorcee caught up in a missing person case that sends shockwaves throughout her life.

programme.title: Murder By Numbers
programme.desc: Sandra Bullock is the seasoned cop on the trail of the privileged high-schoolers who think they've committed the perfect crime. Psychological thriller with Ryan Gosling.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio is a master of sub-conscious espionage in Christopher Nolan's blockbuster. Sci-fi thriller. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Cellular
programme.desc: Piecing together a broken mobile phone, a kidnapped Kim Basinger makes a call that could save her life. Suspenseful thriller starring Jason Statham and Chris Evans.

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: A widowed mother who goes to a restaurant to meet Henry, her charming date. However, her pleasant evening soon turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a nightmare when an American family stay at a British couple's idyllic estate. Horror with James McAvoy.

programme.title: Step Brothers
programme.desc: Brennan Huff (Will Ferrell) and Dale Doback (John C. Reilly) have one thing in common: they are both lazy, unemployed leeches who still live with their parents. When Brennan's mother and Dale's father marry and move in together, it turns the overgrown boys' world upside down. Their insane rivalry and narcissism pull the new family apart, forcing them to work together to reunite their parents.

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

programme.title: Surfer, Dude
programme.desc: Steve Addington is a professional surfer and beach bum who lives to ride the waves. Content simply to live in the moment, he has a dilemma when his finances dry up and businessman Eddie Zarno offers to hire him for a virtual reality game. programme.title: Leap Year
programme.desc: When yet another anniversary passes without a marriage proposal from her boyfriend, Anna (Amy Adams) decides to take action. Aware of a Celtic tradition that allows women to pop the question on Feb. 29, she plans to follow her lover to Dublin and ask him to marry her. Fate has other plans, however, and Anna winds up on the other side of the Emerald Isle with handsome, but surly, Declan -- an Irish

programme.title: Land of the Lost
programme.desc: A space-time vortex sucks scientist Rick Marshall (Will Ferrell), his assistant Holly (Anna Friel) and a survivalist Will (Danny R. McBride) into a world populated by dinosaurs and painfully slow creatures called Sleestaks. programme.title: Shaft
programme.desc: Crooked cops on the take -- small-time drug lords -- sleazy informers and sadistic rich kids ready to kill --- for police detective John Shaft, its just another night in the underbelly of New York City, another shift facing down cops and criminals who want him dead and a legal system that thrives on money, not justice.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In the year 2077, Jack Harper works as a security repairman on an Earth left empty and devastated after a war with aliens. programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: NASCAR superstar Ricky Bobby is at the top of his game; adored by fans, a trophy wife by his side, and incredible wealth. But Ricky loses it all when French Formula One champion Jean Girard roars onto the scene. Ricky, with the help of his ruthless father, must pull himself out of the depths of despair and restore his honor on the racetrack.

programme.title: The Giant Mechanical Man
programme.desc: A street performer (Chris Messina) and an unemployed woman (Jenna Fischer), who's under constant pressure from her sister, help each other realize that it only takes a single person to engender someone's self-worth.

programme.title: Monster Zone
programme.desc: Transferred to a boarding school, a 15-year-old accidentally opens a portal that unleashes monsters from another dimension.

programme.title: House of D
programme.desc: In the present, artist Tom Warshaw recalls his traumatic coming of age. As a 13-year-old growing up in New York City in 1973, Tom hangs out with Pappass, a mentally disabled man. With Tom's mother battling depression after the death of her husband, the young boy is left to his own devices. When Tom develops a crush on schoolmate Melissa, Pappass feels abandoned and begins behaving erratically.

programme.title: Win a Date With Tad Hamilton!
programme.desc: Pete (Topher Grace), the quirky, self-deprecating manager of a grocery store, is madly in love with his best friend, Rosalee (Kate Bosworth). programme.title: Time Freak
programme.desc: Dumped by his girlfriend, a young physics genius travels back in time to change the past and win her heart again.

programme.title: Bandslam
programme.desc: A gifted singer/songwriter, Charlotte hires Will Burton, a new guy in town, to manage her fledgling rock band. She wants one thing from him: to help her win a contest against her ex-boyfriend in an upcoming battle of the bands. Charlotte's band comes together and seems to have a real shot at victory, while Will and dynamic guitarist Sa5m begin to make some beautiful music of their own.

programme.desc: After being released from prison, a young man reluctantly embarks on a journey with his estranged father to spread his mother's ashes in her native Ireland.

programme.title: Our Friend
programme.desc: After Nicole and Matthew receive life-altering news, the couple find unexpected support from their friend Dane, who puts his own life on hold to move into their family home.

programme.title: Atlantic City
programme.desc: When Sally Matthews (Susan Sarandon) leaves her Canadian home to relocate to Atlantic City, she aspires to a prosperous career in the gambling industry. With her criminal husband (Robert Joy) on her trail, however, it appears that she can't escape from trouble, until she finds an unlikely savior in Lou Pascal (Burt Lancaster), an aging small-time mobster. By becoming involved with Sally, Lou finds

programme.title: Crisis
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her son's disappearance.

programme.desc: To be young and carefree amid the blue waters and idyllic landscape of sun-drenched Italy in the late 1950s; that's la dolce vita Tom Ripley (Matt Damon) craves- and Dickie Greenleaf (Jude Law) leads. programme.title: The Beldham
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her family's home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Into the Wild
programme.desc: A top student and athlete leaves his middle-class life to venture into Alaska, only to meet people who will eventually shape his values and life.

programme.title: Black Lotus
programme.desc: A soldier uses his military training to rescue the kidnapped daughter of his dead friend.

programme.title: Barron's Cove
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his son's death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, he's left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: While traveling to California, Taylor and his wife, Amy, experience a vehicle malfunction on a remote highway. Amy Taylor accepts a ride from a truck driver to seek assistance while Jeff Taylor remains with the vehicle. When the couple fails to reunite at a designated location, Jeff Taylor begins a search for his wife despite a lack of assistance from local residents or law enforcement.

programme.title: Bang Bang
programme.desc: Following Bang Bang Rozyski, an eccentric retired pugilist obsessed with rectifying the sins of his past.

programme.title: Seabiscuit

At first the horse struggles to win, but eventually Seabiscuit becomes one of the most successful thoroughbreds of all

programme.title: Heartburn
programme.desc: Rachel Samstat (Meryl Streep), a New York food critic, beds Mark Forman (Jack Nicholson), a Washington, D.C., newspaper columnist. The two fall in love, and Rachel relinquishes her job and relocates to be with a man who views himself as unfit for marriage. programme.title: Dreamland
programme.desc: A teen bounty hunter is torn between helping or capturing a seductive fugitive bank robber hiding in his small town during the Great Depression.

programme.title: The Quiet American
programme.desc: From the classic novel by Graham Greene comes a murder mystery centered on a love triangle set against the French Indochina War in Vietnam, circa 1952. It's the story of a veteran English journalist (Michael Caine), a young American (Brendan Fraser), and a beautiful Vietnamese woman caught between them. This is a world where nothing is what it seems -- suffused with opium, intrigue, and betrayal.

programme.title: Jai Kishen
programme.desc: Separated twins Jai and Kishen reunite after their father's death. Jai is blind but skilled in self-defense. Kishen is a con man. Together, they seek revenge on the gangsters who killed their father.

programme.title: Kuku Mathur Ki Jhand Ho Gayi
programme.desc: Best friends Kuku Mathur and Ronnie spend most of their time together. However, trouble ensues when Ronnie gets busy managing his family business and Kuku is left to own devices.

programme.title: Maidaan
programme.desc: Inspired by the real life of the coach and manager of the Indian national football team, Syed Abdul Rahim, who is also considered the architect of Indian football.

programme.title: Dream Girl 2
programme.desc: Karam secretly turns his female alter ego into a dancer and woos a millionaire''s son in hopes of clearing his family debts and impressing his fiancee''s father.

programme.title: Son Of Sardar 2
programme.desc: Jassi returns to face new enemies and chaos, using wit, bravery, and humor to overcome challenges and protect his loved ones.

programme.title: Devdas
programme.desc: After his wealthy family prohibits him from marrying the woman he is in love with, Devdas's life spirals downward as he takes up alcohol and a life of vice to alleviate the pain.

programme.title: Fateh
programme.desc: A former Special Ops officer is hired to find a missing young woman. He uses his skills to locate her, uncovering threats against her along the way. He strives to learn the truth.

programme.title: Guna 369
programme.desc: The life of Guna turns upside down when he is falsely framed for a murder and imprisoned. After his release, he sets off to hunt the real culprits.

programme.title: Dhol
programme.desc: Four carefree friends try to marry a rich girl to escape poverty but land in a crime mystery. Hilarity, chaos, and unexpected twists follow in this classic comedy of greed and mischief.

programme.title: Atithi Tum Kab Jaoge
programme.desc: A working couple has an unexpected visitor who does not want to leave.

programme.desc: Arjun and Rahul visit their sick grandfather, but family troubles grow. Tensions peak when a girl creates a rift between them, testing their bond and deepening the chaos at home.

programme.title: Kal Ho Naa Ho
programme.desc: Naina's dull life changes when Aman arrives. She loves him, but he claims to be married and urges her friend Rohit to win her heart instead, leading to unexpected emotions and choices.

programme.title: Main Tera Hero
programme.desc: Seenu and Sunaina fall in love with each other when he saves her from a corrupt policeman who wishes to marry her. Meanwhile, Ayesha, a girl Seenu meets on a train journey, wants to marry him.

programme.title: Dil To Pagal Hai
programme.desc: A musical journey of love and destiny, where a dancer believes in true love and finds herself between two men. The film celebrates emotions, dreams, and the magic of following your heart.
